message:
feat(wasm): Add PDB structure parser for 3D visualization

Implements a minimal PDB file parser in Rust/WASM optimized for fast
parsing and small binary size. The parser extracts:
- Atom coordinates (x, y, z)
- Element symbols, atom names, chain IDs
- Residue sequence numbers and names

The output is structured as flat arrays suitable for direct use with
the existing detect_bonds_spatial function and Three.js rendering.

This enables native PDB file loading without external dependencies,
keeping the WASM bundle lean while providing protein/structure
visualization capabilities for phage genomics research.

Also updates TypeScript declarations and rebuilds the WASM binary.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -5,11 +5,13 @@
